matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Child > Day 6 > Lunch > Chickpea Salad Pita — Lemon-Herb Set

node.name: Chickpea Salad Pita — Lemon-Herb Set
node.short_description: Chickpea salad with cucumber, tomato, and lemon tucked into a whole-wheat pita for a fresh, fiber-rich meal.
node.meal_suggestion: Great as a quick vegetarian lunch. Drizzle with olive oil and herbs for healthy fats, or add feta/t Tahini for extra protein; pair with a side greens for balance.
node.nutrition_note: High-fiber, plant-based meal with chickpeas as a protein source, cucumber and tomato for vitamins, and a whole-wheat pita for complex carbs. Lemon adds vitamin C; naturally low in saturated fat.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Child > Day 5 > Breakfast > Smoothie — Berry Boost Skillet

node.name: Smoothie — Berry Boost Skillet
node.short_description: Creamy banana-peanut butter oat smoothie with balanced carbs, protein, and fats.
node.meal_suggestion: Blend banana, milk, peanut butter, and oats until smooth for a creamy drink; add ice for a cooler consistency. Optional toppings: sliced banana, berries, or a sprinkle of extra oats.
node.nutrition_note: Protein- and fiber-rich smoothie from banana, oats, peanut butter, and milk; provides potassium and healthy fats. Use unsweetened milk to limit sugar, and add berries for extra antioxidants if desired.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Child > Day 3 > Lunch > Turkey Sandwich — Garden Veg Combo

node.name: Turkey Sandwich — Garden Veg Combo
node.short_description: A lean turkey sandwich on whole-grain bread with lettuce, tomato, and mustard—protein-rich, fiber-forward, veggie-packed.
node.meal_suggestion: Great grab-and-go lunch; pair with a fruit (apple/banana) and a glass of water for a balanced meal.
node.nutrition_note: Lean protein from turkey + fiber from whole-grain bread; adds veggies (lettuce, tomato) for vitamins and fullness; mustard adds flavor with minimal fat; monitor sodium if using processed turkey or condiments.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Child > Day 5 > Breakfast > Granola & Milk — Garden Veg Bowl

node.name: Granola & Milk — Garden Veg Bowl
node.short_description: A quick granola, milk, and banana bowl offering energy, calcium, potassium, and fiber; customizable with higher-protein milk or added vegetables/fruits.
node.meal_suggestion: To boost protein, use higher-protein milk or add Greek yogurt. For more vegetables, top with a handful of spinach or berries to enhance fiber and micronutrients.
node.nutrition_note: Carb-rich bowl with protein and calcium from milk; banana adds potassium and fiber. Monitor added sugars in granola; choose unsweetened or lower-sugar varieties and watch portion size.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Child > Day 2 > Lunch > Lentil Soup — Citrus Fresh Set

node.name: Lentil Soup — Citrus Fresh Set
node.short_description: A hearty, plant-based lentil soup with vegetables served alongside whole-grain bread—protein- and fiber-rich for a vegetarian lunch or dinner.
node.meal_suggestion: Serve hot with warm whole-grain bread; brighten with a squeeze of lemon or lemon zest to echo the Citrus Fresh theme.
node.nutrition_note: Plant-based protein and fiber from lentils, plus vitamins/minerals from carrots, celery, and onion. Whole-grain bread adds extra fiber and complex carbs. For lower sodium, use a low-sodium broth; a squeeze of lemon can boost citrus brightness.
